commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows a Codex registered-message dynamic-tool test to policy assertions and increases the synthetic bundle MCP `tools/list` timing margins without changing production code.

PR surface: Tests +5. Total +5 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a test-only PR review, not a user bug report. The source review confirms the changed tests target existing Codex registered-tool and MCP catalog-timeout invariants, but I did not reproduce the CI timing issue locally.

target.title: test(ci): stabilize timeout-sensitive shards
target.body:
## Summary

- Stabilize the bundle MCP `tools/list` timeout test so CI startup jitter does not consume the intentionally short connection budget.
- Narrow the Codex dynamic-tools registered-message test to the registered-schema invariant that timed out in plugin prerelease.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `codex review --uncommitted`
- Blocked locally: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tool-build.test.ts src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts` cannot resolve Vitest because this sparse Codex worktree has no `node_modules`.
- Hosted: CI run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27768634746 on `e3391b36b6806079e541ac6f41e455189c226592` is in progress.
- Hosted: Plugin Prerelease run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27768638924 on `e3391b36b6806079e541ac6f41e455189c226592` is in progress.
target.author: vincentkoc
